text:
Soliloquy (, Jimon) is the 291 st chapter of the Hunter × Hunter manga, written and illustrated by Yoshihiro Togashi.

Synopsis

Right as the King accepts Netero's challenge, the latter leaps into the air and positions himself like a lotus flower, reminiscing back to his younger days in a dojo and asking himself when he started waiting for his opponents to attack first. Manifesting his 100-Type Guanyin Bodhisattva, he unleashes its Ninety-Ninth Hand upon the King, repeatedly smashing him into the ground with incredible force. Netero continues to reflect on his younger self, saying that it became customary for his defeated opponents to hold out their hands in gratitude to him, and for him to accept them without a second thought. But his current self rebukes this habit, reflecting on his long-held desire to reach perfection, and he admits that he has always dreamed of fighting with everything he has against an unrelenting adversary.

The force of Netero's attack continues to push the King further and further down, eventually breaking through and reaching an underground chamber filled with numerous pillars. The two reach the bottom, and as the King recovers from the onslaught, Netero informs that that this location will be his grave. He quickly brings his hands together to pray, and a hand blindsides the King, sending him flying into one of the pillars. Netero considers himself lucky, saying he is thankful for everything that has allowed him to get here, that has allowed him to face the King, as he moves his hands from a praying position and makes them form a heart shape in front of his chest.

Trivia

The chapter's color page was not included in the volume.
